sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113095" key="xalki/ndă" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαλκ-ίνδᾰ</orth>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παίζειν</foreign> to play <sense id="n113095.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the game</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χαλκισμός,</foreign> Id.</sense> </entryFree>
